title: Azure Cognitive Services (Speech) Overview — FigmaFoundry
vision: An enhanced Azure Cognitive Services (Speech Services) overview page that replicates the existing portal layout (essentials, keys, Get Started) and adds a new 'Usage & Insights' tab surfacing API call volume, latency metrics, quota utilization, and recent errors — data that currently requires navigating to the Monitoring section. Uses CuiSideNav with 6 groups, Browse Blade scaffold, shared PageHeader with Copilot suggestions, and Coherence design tokens throughout.
problem: The current Cognitive Services overview page shows only static resource properties and API keys. Engineers must navigate away to Monitoring > Metrics to see any usage data. There's no at-a-glance view of how the resource is performing, whether the free tier quota is being consumed, or if there are recent errors — making the overview page feel like a dead end after initial setup.
successCriteria: Left navigation sidebar with 6 collapsible groups (Quick Access, Resource Management, Security, Monitoring, Automation, Help) using CuiSideNav

Essentials panel displaying Resource group, Status (Active), Location (East US), Subscription, Subscription ID, API Kind (SpeechServices), Pricing tier (Free), Endpoint, Manage keys link, and Tags with JSON View link
Get Started tab with Speech Studio CTA card and keys/endpoint section showing Key 1, Key 2, Location/Region, and Endpoint with copy-to-clipboard buttons
NEW: 'Usage & Insights' tab with 4 KPI summary cards — Total API Calls (7d), Avg Latency (P95), Error Rate, and Quota Used — styled as a metric strip with trend indicators
NEW: API call volume sparkline chart (last 7 days, broken down by operation type: Speech-to-Text, Text-to-Speech, Pronunciation Assessment)
NEW: Quota utilization progress bars showing free tier consumption for each operation (e.g. 3.2K / 5K Speech-to-Text minutes used) with warning state at >80%
NEW: Recent errors table (last 10 failures) with columns: Timestamp, Operation, Error Code, Message, and a 'View in Logs' link
CuiMessageBar info banner about commitment plan association
Copilot suggestion pills in PageHeader: 'Duplicate my Azure AI resource with CLI', 'Best practices for managing AI resources', 'Show platform metrics for this AI resource'
Browse Blade layout with breadcrumb (Home) + PageHeader above 220px collapsible sidebar
nonGoals: Navigation to sub-pages (only Overview page is in scope)
Real-time streaming metrics or live websocket data
constraints: Brownfield: replicate existing Azure Portal Cognitive Services overview page, then enhance with Usage & Insights tab
Use Browse Blade scaffold layout (breadcrumb + PageHeader full-width above sidebar/content split)
Use shared PageHeader pattern with copilotSuggestions prop
Use CuiSideNav for left navigation with collapsible groups
Speech service resource type — API Kind: SpeechServices, Pricing tier: Free
Usage charts use CSS-only sparklines with Coherence tokens (no charting library)
Quota bars use Coherence status tokens: green (<60%), amber (60-80%), red (>80%)
